title: When Seasons Tumble
synopsis: A small dragon's invention to organize the seasons goes hilariously wrong in his upside-down cloud garden, causing chaotic weather mix-ups that teach him sometimes nature knows best.

pages.text: The turnip seeds started dancing upward, which was very wrong indeed! Ember the baby dragon watched his cloud garden wiggle and jiggle. "My Season-Sorting Machine will fix this," he puffed. "No more messy mixed-up weather! Spring here, summer there, winter over there!" He cranked the sparkly contraption with his curly tail. But seasons don't like being sorted, not one tiny bit! The machine went BOING and SPROING! Suddenly spring sprouted EVERYWHERE - even in the winter corner where icicles grew confused and started melting into surprised puddles.

illustration.description: A small friendly baby dragon with coral-red scales, a cream belly, tiny folded wings, a curly tail, and big warm amber eyes operates a whimsical machine with gears and springs. His upside-down cloud garden has flowers blooming chaotically while turnip seeds float upward. Spring flowers burst everywhere, even where snow should be. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, joyful energetic mood.
illustration.alt: Dragon with Season-Sorting Machine causing spring chaos in cloud garden

pages.text: The machine hiccupped and summer gushed out like hot soup! "Oh my scales and whiskers!" Ember giggled as sunshine flooded his garden. The poor winter roses got so hot they started fanning themselves with their own petals! Even the snowmen (who lived under the summer tree, very confused) began sweating puddles that floated UP instead of down. "Seasons should stay put!" Ember declared, adjusting more knobs. But the machine disagreed with a tremendous WHOOSH! Now it was summer in spring's spot, spring in winter's spot, and winter hiding under the gardening shed, shivering and asking, "What's happening out there?"

illustration.description: A small friendly baby dragon with coral-red scales, a cream belly, tiny folded wings, a curly tail, and big warm amber eyes looks delighted as summer sunshine floods his upside-down cloud garden. Winter roses fan themselves with petals while confused snowmen sweat upward-floating puddles. The Season-Sorting Machine steams comically. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic mood.
illustration.alt: Dragon's garden with summer sunshine making winter elements comically hot

pages.text: CLANG went the machine, and autumn arrived like a circus! Leaves fell UP instead of down, bonking poor Ember on his amber-eyed head. "Ouch! Oops! Oh dear!" he squeaked, dodging flying pumpkins. The autumn leaves got terribly mixed up and started falling in summer, which made the hot sunshine very grumpy indeed. Even worse, the pumpkins began growing in winter's icy patch and turned into confused pumpkin-icicles! "This isn't working quite right," Ember admitted, watching a very dizzy leaf trying to fall upward through a cloud. But his machine had one more season to sort, and it was feeling very mischievous about winter.

illustration.description: A small friendly baby dragon with coral-red scales, a cream belly, tiny folded wings, a curly tail, and big warm amber eyes dodges upward-falling autumn leaves and flying pumpkins in his topsy-turvy cloud garden. Pumpkin-icicles grow in icy patches while leaves fall in wrong directions. The machine clangs dramatically. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, joyful energetic mood.
illustration.alt: Dragon dodging upward-falling leaves and flying pumpkins in chaotic autumn scene

pages.text: With a final KAPOW, winter exploded out sideways! Snow zoomed left, ice slid right, and cold wind spun in dizzy circles. "Help!" laughed Ember as snowflakes tickled his coral-red scales. Now his cloud garden was a wonderful, terrible, mixed-up mess - spring flowers wearing winter hats, summer sun making autumn leaves dance, and winter snow growing summer tomatoes! Everything was everywhere and nowhere was where! "Perhaps," puffed the little dragon thoughtfully, "seasons like to mix and mingle and be together sometimes." He unplugged his machine with a gentle claw. Slowly, sweetly, the seasons settled into their own cozy rhythm again.

illustration.description: A small friendly baby dragon with coral-red scales, a cream belly, tiny folded wings, a curly tail, and big warm amber eyes stands peacefully in his cloud garden as all four seasons swirl together harmoniously. Spring flowers wear snow caps, summer tomatoes grow in winter patches, autumn leaves dance in summer sun. The machine sits quietly unplugged. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic mood.
illustration.alt: Dragon in beautifully chaotic garden with all seasons mixing naturally together

pages.text: Now Ember tends his upside-down garden with his claws instead of his machine. He watches seasons come and go like old friends visiting. Sometimes winter drops by spring for tea, or autumn shares jokes with summer. "They know when to visit and when to rest," Ember hums happily. His Season-Sorting Machine sits quietly in the shed, covered with grateful flowers that bloom whenever they please. And Ember? He's too busy planting and playing and watching clouds drift by to worry about sorting anything ever again. The seasons dance their own dance, and that's perfectly, wonderfully, exactly right.

illustration.description: A small friendly baby dragon with coral-red scales, a cream belly, tiny folded wings, a curly tail, and big warm amber eyes tends his peaceful upside-down cloud garden with his claws, looking content. All four seasons coexist naturally around him like friendly neighbors. The machine sits forgotten in a flower-covered shed. Clouds drift peacefully overhead. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic mood.
illustration.alt: Dragon peacefully gardening in his harmonious cloud garden with seasons in natural balance

coverPrompt.description: A small friendly baby dragon with coral-red scales, a cream belly, tiny folded wings, a curly tail, and big warm amber eyes stands in a lush garden growing upside down from fluffy white clouds. Flowers hang downward while snow, rain, and sunshine swirl together in delightful chaos around him. Bright sunny playground art style with primary colors, white space, joyful energetic mood.
coverPrompt.alt: Dragon in upside-down cloud garden with mixed-up seasons

questions.question: Where does Ember's garden grow?
questions.explanation: Ember's special garden grows on the underside of a cloud!

questions.question: What does Ember's machine do wrong?
questions.explanation: The Season-Sorting Machine makes all the seasons get mixed up instead of staying in order!

questions.question: What happens to the leaves in autumn?
questions.explanation: The mixed-up autumn makes leaves fall UP instead of down, bonking Ember on the head!

questions.question: How does Ember finally fix his garden?
questions.explanation: Ember unplugs his machine and lets the seasons settle naturally!

questions.question: What does Ember learn at the end?
questions.explanation: Ember learns that seasons know when to come and go naturally, like old friends!
